This is bit of a personal gripe for me. When I started my applications for graduate and masters schools, it was so overwhelming. There's GRE, TOEFL, SOPs, LORs etc and every country's (and even different universities in the same country) application seems to follow some different procedures and guidelines. 

I felt a bit lost there. 

So I decided to try out consulting agencies. But they didn't have a clue about what I am trying to do and wanted to push me towards universities I had no interest in applying to (I am guessing they were getting commissions). 
Seeing the lack of value and exorbitant costs I decided not to go with any consulting agency. It was not worth it. 

But I was still overwhelmed and needed clarity. After asking a lot of questions from my seniors and peers, reading countless guides, reddit threads, youtube videos, making dozens of spreadsheets, and 6-8 months of hustle, things started to make sense. 

My mails were getting better, my SOPs were not generic and had clarity and gradually professors started showing interest in my cold emails. 

Then I realised that this whole journey is not impossible, just very confusing and overwhelming for those who have just started. And the study abroad consulting industry is a big elaborate scam. 

That's when I decided to set my eyes on how to fix this problem (one I had faced and suffered personally from). 

Together with @Aryann_7, I am happy to announce that we are starting Enrolia Private Beta Cohort, completely free for the whole application cycle, for students who want to study abroad, but don't have the luxury to go with expensive consulting agencies. 
We will help all students/applicants in gaining the confidence to apply, write cold emails that gets replies, draft stellar SOPs, apply for scholarships, shortlist universities and professors that are fit for them. On top we are not taking commissions from any university, ever!
We will have weekly sessions over discord and solve all doubts asynchronously in the channels. Also we will bringing a lot of current students and alumni from top schools to solve student's doubts. 

People who are genuinely in need of something like this and are ready to put it in the effort are welcome to apply. We will not hand hold but actually teach the applicants how to traverse through this whole process without feeling overwhelmed, and if they get stuck, we are there to help them. 

Due to limited manpower, we can only open up this cohort for upto 250 students in this cycle.

Visit https://t.co/eUM5tKxIKZ to apply. We will be reading each and every application manually. 

For others, please spread the word, so that this post reaches to students who are genuinely in need. Students who otherwise would give up on their dreams to study abroad.

Spotify is the main money source for music now.  
But streams don’t pay equally worldwide.  
1M streams in Nigeria = $300.  
1M streams in Sweden = $10,000.  
That’s 33x difference for the same song.
